requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Chad BESS Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为乍得BESS验收国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為乍得BESS驗收國際基準

summary.en: Chad has not published a widely cited standalone mandatory BESS product safety statute equivalent to a full EU-style battery regulation. Project review in the Chad context is therefore typically driven by utility or industrial tender clauses, with IEC-based technical expectations for critical risk controls. For project acceptance, IEC 62619 evidence for lithium cells and modules remains a common expectation where large-format BESS is involved.
summary.zh: 乍得目前未公开可对照的独立强制性BESS产品安全法令，与欧盟式电池法规等效。乍得的合规实践多由电力项目招标和工程合同条款驱动，关注IEC为核心的关键风险控制要求。对于大容量BESS项目，IEC 62619电芯与模组证据通常是项目验收预期之一。
summary.zht: 乍得目前未公開可對照的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法令，與歐盟式電池法規等效。乍得的合規實務多由電力項目招標和工程合約條款驅動，聚焦IEC為核心的關鍵風險控制要求。對於大容量BESS項目，IEC 62619電芯與模組證據通常是項目驗收預期之一。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation
SNE project-driven documentation and acceptance route where energy-system safety is included in project requirements

summary.en: China’s BESS cell and module baseline references include GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023, while GB 38031 is auto-oriented to traction-battery (automotive) contexts. These are relevant as engineering quality references for export producers, but they are not usually treated as automatic substitutes for Chad project specifications when IEC-based acceptance is required.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电芯和模组基线参考包括GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023，GB 38031为动力蓄电池汽车场景导向。它们对制造端工程质量有价值，但在乍得项目要求IEC验收时通常不被视为自动替代文件。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電芯和模組基線參考包括GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023，GB 38031為動力蓄電池汽車場景導向。它們對製造端工程質量有價值，但在乍得項目要求IEC驗收時通常不被視為自動替代文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求

gap.en: Critical gap: project specs in Chad commonly require explicit IEC evidence, not only domestic Chinese standard compliance. Exporters should map CHad project requirements to IEC 62619 for cells/modules, confirm any required test reports before procurement, and avoid presenting Chinese GB/T compliance as market-ready proof.
gap.zh: 关键差距：乍得项目通常要求明确的IEC证据，而不仅是中国国内合规。出口商应将项目要求映射到IEC 62619的电芯与模组证据，并在采购前确认所需测试报告，不应以中国GB/T合规说明市场即可接受。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：乍得項目通常要求明確的IEC證據，而不僅是中國國內合規。出口商應將項目要求映射到IEC 62619的電芯與模組證據，並在採購前確認所需測試報告，不應以中國GB/T合規說明即可進入市場。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and often mandatory where tender documents or SNE-led review require IEC 62619-aligned cell/module safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese standards are reference baseline only for engineering planning

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T/中国 domestic BESS safety documentation as engineering support. For Chad project acceptance, confirm whether IEC 62619 evidence is explicitly required and align test reports and reporting scope to the exact cell/module configurations being supplied.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将中国GB/T/BESS安全文件视为工程支持性资料。若乍得项目验收明确要求IEC 62619证据，请确认并对齐所供货型号的电芯与模组测试范围与报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將中國GB/T/BESS安全文件視為工程支持性資料。若乍得項目驗收明確要求IEC 62619證據，請確認並對齊所供貨型號的電芯與模組測試範圍與報告。
